versions.content: A Game Environment establishes a specific cardpool from which a player can customize their deck. This document details two game environments: the Legacy Environment (using all products in a player's collection) and the Limited Environment (a restricted subset consisting of the core set, up to 3 expansions, and up to 10 hero packs).

whats_new.diff: Added Appendix VI: Game Environments (Beta). This formalizes the standard 'Legacy Environment' and introduces a brand new 'Limited Environment' format to help curate smaller cardpools for deckbuilding.

versions.content: Guard is a keyword. While a minion with the guard keyword is engaged with a player, that player cannot use cards or basic powers to attack the villain.
